paper_metadata.title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways
paper_metadata.abstract: Large language models have been shown to achieve remarkable performance across a variety of natural language tasks using few-shot learning, which drastically reduces the number of task-specific training examples needed to adapt the model to a particular application. To further our understanding of the impact of scale on few-shot learning, we trained a 540-billion parameter, densely activated, Transformer language model, which we call Pathways Language Model PaLM. We trained PaLM on 6144 TPU v4 chips using Pathways, a new ML system which enables highly efficient training across multiple TPU Pods. We demonstrate continued benefits of scaling by achieving state-of-the-art few-shot learning results on hundreds of language understanding and generation benchmarks. On a number of these tasks, PaLM 540B achieves breakthrough performance, outperforming the finetuned state-of-the-art on a suite of multi-step reasoning tasks, and outperforming average human performance on the recently released BIG-bench benchmark. A significant number of BIG-bench tasks showed discontinuous improvements from model scale, meaning that performance steeply increased as we scaled to our largest model. PaLM also has strong capabilities in multilingual tasks and source code generation, which we demonstrate on a wide array of benchmarks. We additionally provide a comprehensive analysis on bias and toxicity, and study the extent of training data memorization with respect to model scale. Finally, we discuss the ethical considerations related to large language models and discuss potential mitigation strategies.

extraction_data.innovation: Scaling language models to 540B parameters using the Pathways system for efficient training across multiple TPU Pods, achieving state-of-the-art few-shot learning performance on a wide range of tasks, including breakthrough results on multi-step reasoning and BIG-bench benchmarks. Demonstrates discontinuous improvements on BIG-bench tasks with scale.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: High-quality, diverse text corpus (details in Section 3)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised discriminative fine-tuning on task-proportionate mixture of SuperGLUE tasks
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam (implied from context, but not explicitly stated in the excerpt)
extraction_data.extension: Pathways system enables pipeline-free training across 6144 TPU v4 chips spanning multiple pods, achieving unprecedented efficiency for large-scale models.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models for improved few-shot learning and task generalization
extraction_data.application: Few-shot learning, multilingual tasks, code generation, reasoning, question answering, natural language generation
